description: Concurrent group MEMBERSHIP tracking (hermetic, single-instance): create TWO groups, prove BOTH appear in knownGroups, then leave ONE and prove only that one is removed (the other stays). Guards against quitGroup over-removing or knownGroups collapsing multiple groups. Uses EXACT containsItem/notContainsItem so a prefix-sharing local id (tox_1 vs tox_10) can't false-match. The first leave is the gated step; teardown leaves both (idempotent) so a mid-scenario failure still leaks nothing.
